title: ageratina ventillana
intro: Ageratina ventillana, also known as White Cloud or White Cloudflower, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Ageratina ventillana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ageratina ventillana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it easily accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
